ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHILD CUSTODY AND VISITATION ON JUL-09-2007 CONTINUED TO FAMILY LAW TRIAL/ SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR ON JUL-30-2007 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 425 - MOTHER IN PRO PER. N/A BY FATHER. MATTER CONTINUED PER COMMISSIONER'S ORDER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHILD CUSTODY AND VISITATION ON AUG-17-2007 DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART. AFTER TESTIMONY BY THE PARTIES, AND GOOD APPEARING, THE COURT DENIED MOTHER'S REQUEST TO MODIFY CC, BUT DID PERMIT MOTHER SUPERVISED VISITS WITH THE MINORS @ MOTHER'S TRANSITIONAL PROGRAM - CAMEO HOUSE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.
